_comment: Project-scoped MCP server config for the Coveo Pokemon Challenge. Wires the Coveo Hosted MCP Server (Phase 8.5) so Claude Code can call the four Coveo MCP tools — search / fetch / get_passages / answer — against this repo's pokemon-mcp server in the benichou org. Auth via Anonymous API key in the Authorization header. Both COVEO_MCP_ENDPOINT and COVEO_MCP_API_KEY are env-var substituted at startup, so secrets stay in .env (gitignored), not in this committed file. Launch Claude Code in this repo with the env loaded (e.g. `set -a; source .env; set +a; claude`) so the substitution resolves; otherwise the tools will 401.
